calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William F. Abbott, Esq., Tel. 415.987.6051, specially appearing for assignee Jefferson Capital Systems, LLC;
Michele Haines, Tel. 415.504.5762, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The Court examined defendant/claimant Michele Haines. After hearing, the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Michele Haines is granted in part. The levying officer shall withhold $50 per pay period from Michele Haines for payment on the judgment. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org.
